author: gb9t
content: Iter 116 result: net/sched/sch-codel.md (Controlled Delay AQM - sch_codel.c ~286 lines + codel.h ~167 lines; per-skb sojourn-time tracking via skb.tstamp + per-pkt should_drop test sojourn>=target 5ms continuously for >=interval 100ms + dropping state machine + control_law(t, interval, count)=t+interval/sqrt(count) Newton-Raphson rec_inv_sqrt + ECN-mark + ce_threshold pre-drop CE-mark + Nichols-Jacobson 2012 parameterless self-tuning + bufferbloat mitigation + count -=2 vs reset on re-entry within 16xinterval) + virt/kvm/pfncache.md (KVM gfn-to-pfn cache - pfncache.c ~484 lines; per-(GPA,len) gfn_to_pfn_cache hot-mapped guest page kva for steal-time/pvclock/async-pf/HV-SynIC/STIMER + per-rwlock fast-read + write-lock refresh + kvm_gpc_init/activate/check/refresh/deactivate/mark_dirty + kvm_gpc_activate_hva HVA-anchored variant + per-VM kvm.gpc_list + gpc_invalidate_start on memslot mutation + 2-page span via vmap-contiguous + MMU-notifier integration + KVM_HVA_ERR_BAD sentinel). 182 Tier-3s total. Next iter: net/sched/sch-pie.md (PIE proportional-integral) + virt/kvm/guest-memfd.md (guest_memfd for confidential VMs).
